creator: mpp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

I can duplicate the problem under 3.0-current by 
filling /var/tmp and then editing a file.  Deleteing the 
first line of the file garbages the screen.  Redrawing 
it seems to look OK, but if you write the file out you 
will discover that the line really was deleted and should 
not be displayed on the screen.
